title: How can I see a list of Tasks by Priority (custom column) on my dashboard?
excerpt: We have added a custom column to our boards named “priority” and we use values like High, Medium and Low.  I’d like to have a quick glance daily on my dashboard showing me the open tasks by priority level.  Anyone know o…

posts.author: lisamdye (Lisa Dye)
posts.cookedHtml: We have added a custom column to our boards named “priority” and we use values like High, Medium and Low. I’d like to have a quick glance daily on my dashboard showing me the open tasks by priority level. Anyone know of an easy way to do this?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @lisamdye - Have you thought of using a Battery Widget and selecting the Priority column and then filtering day by day?

image972×562 8.42 KB

Then look for the date column:

posts.author: slash (Sharon Lashbrooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to do a similar thing. Is there a way to stop it appearing in the battery when the task has been marked as Done? I am only interested in seeing high priority tasks that need to be completed.
